source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (fundamentals); web sources noted per field
_note: Stalwart (steady, recession-resistant death-care roll-up; NOT cyclical). eps_ttm is a TRUE trailing-4-quarter diluted EPS through 2026-03-31, not the FY2025 figure the fetch_edgar scaffold defaulted to. total_debt corrected from the scaffold: the script summed LongTermDebtNoncurrent+LongTermDebtCurrent ($6.2M, a minor finance-lease sub-component) instead of the comprehensive LongTermDebt tag ($522.3M = $397.5M 4.25% Senior Notes due 2029 + $119.3M Credit Facility). See data-quality notes.

eps_ttm.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (EarningsPerShareDiluted): trailing 4 quarters = 2025Q2 0.74 + 2025Q3 0.41 + 2025Q4 0.78 (derived FY2025 3.25 minus 9mo-2025 2.47) + 2026Q1 0.84. Independently corroborated by stockanalysis.com TTM EPS ~$2.76.

dividend_per_share.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (CommonStockDividendsPerShareDeclared); corroborated stockanalysis.com $0.45 annual ($0.1125/qtr)

shares_outstanding.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (CommonStockSharesOutstanding); dei cover 15,872,328 as of 2026-04-28

total_debt.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001016281 (LongTermDebt, comprehensive tag); company Q1-2026 release: $397.5M 4.25% Senior Notes due 2029 + $119.3M Credit Facility

long_term_growth_estimate_pct.source: Analyst consensus near-term EPS growth ~7.4% (year-ahead FY EPS ~$3.20-$3.45). LABEL: ESTIMATE. Range across sources 4.8% (Simply Wall St per-annum EPS) to 7.9% (earnings).

institutional_ownership_pct.source: stockanalysis.com / MarketBeat 13F aggregates (66.46%); a second source cited 76.37% - used the lower, better-corroborated figure

insider_activity.value: Routine equity-comp grants and tax-withholding dispositions only (e.g., CFO/CIO RSU & PSU grants Feb 2026; director stock grants Mar 2026; VP 164 shares withheld for taxes on vesting). No open-market insider buys or open-market sales.
